items.question: When is my order pressed?
items.answer: On the morning of delivery - never in advance, so it reaches you at its freshest.

items.question: How long does it stay fresh?
items.answer: Best within 3 days refrigerated. There are no preservatives, so keep it chilled and enjoy it quickly.

items.question: What are the delivery slots?
items.answer: Morning, afternoon or evening - you pick your slot when you order.

items.question: Is delivery free?
items.answer: Free on local orders over £15. Outside the local zone a small distance-based fee applies at checkout.

items.question: Can I set up a repeat order?
items.answer: Yes - tell us the flavours and cadence and we will keep it running. Pause or change any time.
